headline: National Higher Education Strategic Plan 2.0 Delayed by 18 Months
context: The successor to PSPTN Phase 3 was due in mid-2024 but has not been released as of early 2026.

cards.big: National higher education strategic plan delayed 18 months past its mid-2024 deadline
cards.sub: Universities operate without updated policy direction during the planning vacuum

cards.big: 3 ministerial changes between 2022 and 2025 disrupted strategic planning continuity
cards.sub: Each minister initiated fresh consultations rather than continuing predecessor's work

cards.big: Previous PSPTN set 23 KPIs but final progress report was never publicly released
cards.sub: Accountability gap means successes and failures of prior plan remain unassessed

cards.big: Ireland published its 2030 higher education strategy on schedule despite 2 government changes
cards.sub: Bipartisan commitment to education planning transcended political transitions

cards.big: A nation that cannot sustain education policy beyond ministerial tenure cannot plan its future
Should education strategic plans be protected from disruption by ministerial changes
